arts.ttl: “Would not sell” | West Ham owners rule out sale of star player
arts.sum: West Ham are not willing to sell their star player “for any price”. While much of the blame for West Ham’s awful start to the season has been placed on Julen Lopetegui, and for good reason, it doesn’t mean that he is solely responsible. Many of the club’s players simply have not shown up when... The post “Would not sell” | West Ham owners rule out sale of star player appeared first on The West Ham Way.
